title: Kindergarten Programme
tagline: A completely free kindergarten for vulnerable children — including free daily lunch — giving every child the best possible start in life.
intro_p1: The earliest years of a child's life are the most critical for development. Yet for vulnerable families in Kisumu, quality early childhood education is out of reach. UCDP's Kindergarten Programme removes every barrier — offering a fully free, nurturing, and stimulating learning environment for young children in the community.
intro_p2: Attendance is completely free for all children — every child enrolled comes from a vulnerable background in the community. There are no fees, no hidden costs. In addition, every child receives a free lunch during the school day, ensuring they are nourished and ready to learn.
intro_p3: Our kindergarten provides a safe, joyful space where children develop literacy, numeracy, social skills, and confidence — preparing them for a smooth transition into primary school.

steps.title: Enrolment
steps.text: Vulnerable children from the community are enrolled completely free of charge — no fees, no conditions.

steps.title: Daily Learning
steps.text: Children participate in a structured daily programme covering literacy, numeracy, creative play, and social development.

steps.title: Free Daily Lunch
steps.text: Every child receives a nutritious free lunch during the school day, supporting their health and ability to learn.

steps.title: School Readiness
steps.text: By the time they graduate from kindergarten, children are confident, curious, and ready for primary school.
